title: Goeppertia erecta

It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Goeppertia erecta include flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Goeppertia erecta is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is used to make teas, tinctures, and extracts that are used to treat a range of health conditions.
